ID: US-CMP-FE-711
Title: Report dashboard UI and filter controls
Status: Done
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-711
Epic: CMP-E7: Reporting and Export
---

As a stakeholder
I want a report workspace with quick date presets and campaign filters so I can produce updates fast.
So reporting is repeatable and low effort.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Presets: last 7 days, last 30 days, current month, custom range.
- [ ] Campaign and content type filters are displayed and applied.
- [ ] Metrics cards and grouped tables/charts update on filter change.
- [ ] Filter selections are visible in report header.
- [ ] Loading/error/no-data states are clear.
